violations.text: Freezer #2 was in poor repair, non-functional at the time of this inspection. PIC stated work order was placed June 2025. Establishment is sharing freezer space within facility at this time. New Violation. Correct By: 11/24/2025

The automatic dispenser at the 3-bay sink is dispensing at a concentration greater than 400ppm. Work order has been placed. Establishment to dilute and test sanitizer for proper concentration. New Violation. Correct By: 12/13/2024
